# Daniel Siegle

> AI/ML Engineer — North Carolina
> Founder, Deep Learning RTP | Possible Futures, LLC

## About

Daniel Siegle is an AI/ML engineer based in North Carolina. He contracts through
Possible Futures, LLC, focusing on LLM training and fine-tuning as well as
traditional ML projects across the biotech and life-sciences space.

He holds an M.S. in Pharmaceutical Sciences from North Carolina Central University,
where his thesis — "Cytochrome P450 Inhibitor Classification with Statistical
Learning" — benchmarked Bayesian binary QSAR against scikit-learn classifiers on
HTS luminescence assay data for five CYP isozymes (1A2, 2C9, 2C19, 2D6, 3A4).
He earned a B.S. in Biology from UNC-Chapel Hill.

Industry experience includes four years at Q2 Solutions (Scientific Programmer,
then Bioinformatics Software Engineer at Q2 Genomics), teaching AI for Health and
Life Sciences at the North Carolina School of Science and Mathematics (NCSSM), and
drug manufacturing at Biogen Idec.

He founded Deep Learning RTP, a 1,700+ member community meetup in the Research
Triangle with 400+ past events focused on deep learning and AI.

## Links

- Website: https://5x5x5x5.github.io
- Consultancy: https://5x5x5x5.com

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-siegle/
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/danielsiegle.bsky.social
- Meetup: https://www.meetup.com/deep-learning-rtp/
- Email: daniel.siegle@gmail.com

## Key Projects

- **LLM Training Pipeline**: Production LLM fine-tuning infrastructure —
  50K+ training examples, 500+ tokens/sec throughput
- **gut-typist**: Lua-based typing tutor built for the terminal
- **CYP450 Inhibitor Classification**: M.S. thesis — Bayesian QSAR vs
  scikit-learn classifiers for drug metabolism screening
- **LLM Tuning Demonstration**: End-to-end LLM fine-tuning walkthrough
- **Neural Network in NumPy**: From-scratch neural network implementation
- **Deep Learning RTP**: 1,700+ member AI/ML community, 400+ events

## Topics

machine learning, LLM, fine-tuning, bioinformatics, computational biology,
cheminformatics, QSAR, deep learning, protein design, next-generation sequencing,
neural networks, NLP, biotech, drug discovery, AI education
